A. The system exhibits several issues, including ignoring agent suggestions (repeatedly prompting for a solution despite being told it's unsolvable), action-reasoning mismatches (proposing simplified implementations instead of addressing the core issue), task derailment (proposing irrelevant code), information withholding (providing incomplete information), disobeying task specifications (not fully implementing functions), premature termination (failing a task due to an invalid token), step repetition (repeating the same thought or information), and loss of conversation history (restarting conversations). There are also instances of weak verification and no verification.
